steps.title: Use the known equation
steps.content: The second equation gives $3y$ directly: $3y=11$. This value can be substituted into the other equation without solving for $y$ first.

steps.title: Solve for the value
steps.content: Subtract $11$ from both sides of the equation: $x=29-11=18$. This is the $x$-coordinate of the system's solution. The answer is 18.
